sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85852" key="porfuro/baptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορφῠρό-βαπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85852.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purple-dyed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:208" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">208</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
